# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository uses AGENTS.md as the universal AI operating contract.

Read `AGENTS.md` for the full operating contract — startup protocol, shutdown protocol, agent system, handoff rules, and all writing-task rules.

> Note: Copilot Chat with the repository open can read and follow `AGENTS.md`. Inline completions cannot read it — treat inline Copilot as a drafting assist, not a full handoff agent.
